meta.title: Pacific Cloud Advisors — Vancouver
meta.description: Independent cloud-migration consultancy for mid-market firms across BC and Alberta. AWS-certified, fixed-fee engagements.

data.headline: Migrate your firm to cloud — in 6 weeks, not 6 months.
data.subhead: We help mid-market companies (50-1000 employees) move workloads to AWS with fixed-fee engagements and senior-only consultants.

items.title: Cloud Migration
items.description: End-to-end AWS migration for legacy workloads. Lift-and-shift through full re-architecture.

items.title: Cost Optimization
items.description: Right-size existing footprints. Average client saves 30-40% in the first quarter.

items.title: Security & Compliance
items.description: SOC 2, HIPAA, PIPEDA. We embed compliance into the migration, not after.

text.headline: Senior consultants only. No bait-and-switch.
text.body: Every engagement is staffed with consultants who have at least 8 years of cloud experience. You meet them in the proposal call; they're the ones doing the work. No offshore handoff, no juniors learning on your project.

image.alt: Pacific Cloud team in their downtown office

data.headline: From the firms we've worked with.

items.author: Jennifer K., CTO at Westbrook Insurance
items.text: Pacific moved our policy admin platform to AWS in five weeks, on the dollar. Their security review caught two issues our internal team had missed. Worth every penny.

items.author: Marcus L., VP IT at Coastal Health Systems
items.text: We interviewed three firms. Pacific was the only one that gave us a fixed quote with a clear scope. Delivered on time, no scope creep.

items.author: David R., COO at Northland Logistics
items.text: 30% reduction in our AWS bill in the first month. Their cost-optimization audit paid for itself by week two.

data.headline: Capability deck and case studies.
data.description: Our methodology, recent engagement summaries, and a template scope-of-work for cloud migration.

data.headline: Founded by ex-Amazon cloud architects.
data.narrative: Pacific Cloud Advisors was founded in 2017 by James Chen and Diana Moreno, both former AWS solutions architects. We're a team of fourteen senior consultants based in Vancouver, with engagements across BC, Alberta, and Washington State.

data.headline: Ready to scope a migration?
data.subhead: Schedule a 30-minute call to discuss your workload and timeline. No commitment.
